title: CT10 legal branch run — Default refinement
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT10 (Default refinement). A conforming run may use only CT10 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT10 (Default refinement); must equal "CT10".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT10 (Default refinement) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT10.N01 through CT10.N17; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT10 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT10 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT10 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
